en: Fact is, it's just a sign.
ko: 사실은, 그건 그냥 하나의 상징일 뿐이야.

en: All right, guys, listen to me. Belief doesn't just happen because you hang something up on a wall.
ko: 믿음은 그냥 벽에 뭔가 걸어놓는다고 생기는 게 아니야.

en: All right? It comes from in here, you know?
Only problem is, we all got so much junk floating through us, a lot of times we end up getting
ko: 문제는, 우리 안에 너무 많은 잡동사니가 떠다닌다는 거야,
그래서 많은 경우 우리가 스스로를 방해하게 돼.

en: You know, crap like envy or fear, shame.
ko: 질투나 두려움, 수치 같은 것들 말이야.

en: I don't want to mess around with that shit anymore. You know what I mean?
ko: 더 이상 그런 것들과 엮이고 싶지 않아.

en: Do you? No. No, Coach. No.
Do you? No. No. No, me neither.
Hell no. You know what I want to mess around with?
The belief that I matter. You know? Regardless of what I do or don't achieve.
